AttachPos_X.Wiki: X-axis wheel attachment position, in meters

AttachPos_Y.Wiki: Y-axis wheel attachment position, in meters

AttachPos_Z.Wiki: Z-axis wheel attachment position, in meters

radius.Wiki: Radius of the wheel, in meters

suspensionLength.Wiki: Length of the suspension, in meters

compressPow.Wiki: Strength at which the spring attempts to return to its original length when compressed

relaxPow.Wiki: Strength at which the spring attempts to return to its original length when stretched

Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relaed to tank wheels.
